## Overview
Individuals travelling to Italy with the purpose of transport can apply for Schengen Visa. This category is restricted to aircraft crew members and road haulers 
To apply for this category of visa it is mandatory to present documents proving the status of the applicant along with documents demonstrating the purpose of the journey in Schengen
                                                                            area.

## Visa Fees
In Chongqing Jurisdiction’s VACs, payment can be made through WeChat, Alipay, Fliggypay or in cash at the Submission Counter.
The only currency accepted at the Visa Centers is local currency (CNY).
Visa fees applicable as of 30th March 2026:

[Table:Transport 1]

The visa fee for children from 6 to 12 years old is Euro 45 (RMB 366). This regulation is only for Schengen visa (up to 90 days).
The following categories are exempted from visa fee
Children under 6 years
- school pupils, students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training with the duration of maximum 90 days
- researchers from third countries travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research as defined in Recommendation No 2005/761/EC of the European Parliament and of the Council of 28 September 2005 to facilitate the issue by the Member States of uniform short-stay visas for researchers from third countries travelling within the Community for the purpose of carrying out scientific research
- representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://cps.ssish.com/axa/astp/home?utm_source=vfsglobal_mission_site&utm_medium=website&utm_campaign=Italy_China)
Please click here  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/25my1UOGYdwp0hxLGhd1JL/be848838f2e0629ddfff1f95fe9bded7/Transport-checklist-2024.pdf)to download the complete and detailed checklist for transport Visa application.
Please prepare all necessary documents listed in the checklist before you lodge the application. The Embassy reserves itself the right to request additional information/documentation
                                                                            and to interview the applicant. Lodging of all required documents does not entrust to visa issuance. 

## Photo Specifications
The photo must meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met, the applicant will have to deliver a new photo. The photo requirements are the same for
                                                                            children as for adults.
The Photo shall:
- Be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- Be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- Be in colors with a white background
- Be 3.5X4 cm
- Maximum 6 months old, resemble the applicant
- Full face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- Show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80% of the picture
- Show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes
Regarding glasses:
- Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible
- The glasses cannot be colored
- The rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- There cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Processing Time
According to Schengen Visa Code:
- For Schengen Visas, applications shall be decided on within 15 calendar days from the date of the reception of an admissible application - in accordance with Article 19 - at Embassy/Consulate. That period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed.
- While for National visas, the generally expected deadline can be extended up to 90 days.
It is recommended to lodge visa applications well in advance. Applications cannot be lodged earlier than 180 days prior the start of the intended journey. Please note that for applications lodged at satellite VACs transport of the application to and from the Embassy/ Consulate may take up to four working days.
Citizens of some countries are subject to consultation procedure, which might extend processing time up to 7 days. If you are not a Chinese national, please check here (https://www.eeas.europa.eu/archives/delegations/india/documents/visa_annex_16_prior_consultation_en_(01_03_2013).pdf) if your country/passport needs consultation procedure.

## Download Forms
To apply for a transport visa, you will need to download and fill the below formats:
Visa Application Format for short term visa
New Checklist for transport visa 
Please note:
The application format must be filled in Italian or English or pinyin and signed (in characters in case the applicant is a Chinese national) on the third and fourth page by the applicant himself.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Individuals travelling to Italy with the purpose of Medical treatment can apply for Medical treatment Schengen Visa.
This category is restricted to applicants who are going to Italy for medical cares which cannot be provided in their country of origin.
Please note that in order to apply for this category of visa it is mandatory to present a declaration from the medical institution in Italy stating the diagnosis, the duration of the treatment, the cost of the treatment, together with a declaration stating that the medical institution has already received 30% of the total cost of the treatment.
Please Note:
In case there is someone accompanying the applicant to Italy, he/she must apply for a tourism visa (Please check the Tourism visa webpage to know more about needed documents) .

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Individuals travelling to Italy with the purpose of visiting family or friends can apply for tourism Schengen Visa. 
This category is restricted to applicants in possess of an invitation letter from an Italian citizen or a foreign citizen t resident in Italy.
To apply it is mandatory to present the original of the invitation letter in the format requested by the Consulate, fully filled and a copy of the ID card (in case of EU citizens)
                                                                            showing the page with the signature, or a copy of the passport ( showing signature page). Non EU citizens must also provide a copy of the residence permit.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Individuals travelling to Italy with the purpose of transit can apply for Schengen Visa. Please note that applicants applying for a transit visa are required to provide documents according to this category
This category is restricted to applicants in possess of an invitation letter from the country of actual destination or an invitation letter from the Italian Maritime Agency chopped by the Italian Maritime Agency .
To apply for this business category of visa it is mandatory in case of embarkation from an Italian Port to send the same invitation letter also by fax to the Embassy.

## Visa Fees
In Chongqing Jurisdiction’s VACs, payment can be made through WeChat, Alipay, Fliggypay or in cash at the Submission Counter.
The only currency accepted at the Visa Centers is local currency (CNY).
Visa fees applicable as of 30th March 2026:

[Table:Transit]

Special Schengen visa fees 35 Euro (RMB 285) for following countries: Belarus, Ukraine, Albania, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Macedonia, Montenegro, Serbia (incl. Kosovo), Moldova, Armenia, Azerbaijan.
The visa fee for children from 6 to 12 years old is Euro 45 (RMB 366). This regulation is only for Schengen visa (up to 90 days).
The following categories are exempted from visa fee
Children under 6 years
- school pupils, students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training with the duration of maximum 90 days
- researchers from third countries travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research as defined in Recommendation No 2005/761/EC of the European Parliament and of the Council of 28 September 2005 to facilitate the issue by the Member States of uniform short-stay visas for researchers from third countries travelling within the Community for the purpose of carrying out scientific research
- representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations
- EU/EEA citizens family members, when accompanying or joining the EU/EEA relative, falling under Directive 2004/38/CE and Italian Legislative Decree 30/2007:

- spouses;
- partner (in case of bounding civil union, compared by hosting Member State’s law to marriage and not in violation of hosting Member State law);
- direct descendants under the age of 21 or who rely on them and those of the spouse or partner;
- direct ascendants relying on them and those of the spouse or partner.
Services fees and Additional Service Fees:
Service Fees

[Table:Transit1]
Additional Service Fees (Optional)

All below services are optional

[Table:Transit2]

*Inclusive of: free photocopying (up to a limit of 10 pages), free SMS/E-mail notification, Personalized service, Beverages (without alcohol), Magazines , Italian coffee.

**：For the reservation please visit our website: https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/ita/book-an-appointment (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/ita/book-an-appointment)
All above mentioned services are optional services and will not reduce the processing time or influence the visa request outcome.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://cps.ssish.com/axa/astp/home?utm_source=vfsglobal_mission_site&utm_medium=website&utm_campaign=Italy_China)
Please click here  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/74INJpe3KbGhvEhAnPzSGE/fb26c03ce8fc76cea43219addbcfb04b/Checklist-Transit-visa.pdf)to download the complete and detailed
                                                                            checklist for transit Visa application.
Please prepare all necessary documents listed in the checklist before you lodge the application. The Embassy reserves itself the right to request additional information/documentation
                                                                            and to interview the applicant. Lodging of all required documents does not entrust to visa issuance. 

## Photo Specifications
The photo must meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met, the applicant will have to deliver a new photo. The photo requirements are the same for
                                                                            children as for adults.
The Photo shall:
- Be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- Be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- Be in colors with a white background
- Be 3.5X4 cm
- Maximum 6 months old, resemble the applicant
- Full face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- Show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80% of the picture
- Show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes
Regarding glasses:
- Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible
- The glasses cannot be colored
- The rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- There cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Processing Time
According to Schengen Visa Code:
- For Schengen Visas, applications shall be decided on within 15 calendar days from the date of the reception of an admissible application - in accordance with Article 19 - at Embassy/Consulate. That period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days in individual cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is needed.
- While for National visas, the generally expected deadline can be extended up to 90 days.
It is recommended to lodge visa applications well in advance. Applications cannot be lodged earlier than 180 days prior the start of the intended journey. Please note that for applications lodged at satellite VACs transport of the application to and from the Embassy/ Consulate may take up to four working days.
Citizens of some countries are subject to consultation procedure, which might extend processing time up to 7 days. If you are not a Chinese national, please check here (https://www.eeas.europa.eu/archives/delegations/india/documents/visa_annex_16_prior_consultation_en_(01_03_2013).pdf) if your country/passport needs consultation procedure.

Please note:
The application format must be filled in Italian or English or pinyin and signed in the third and fourth page by the applicant himself. In case of minors, the signature must be of at least one of the parents or legal guardians.

To download the Application Form:
- Click on the form link

- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Groups travelling to Italy with the purpose of tourism ADS can apply for Schengen Visa. Please note that applicants applying for a tourism visa are required to provide documents according
                                                                            to this category
This category is restricted to groups of applicants who refer to a tour leader and whose documents are submitted by accredited agencies.
For ADS applications: 
ADS agents are kindly requested to book an appointment at the visa center they intend to lodge the group application by sending an email to 
infocq.itacn@vfshelpline.com (mailto:infocq.itacn@vfshelpline.com)                                                                            for Chongqing Italy Visa Application Centerinfoctu.itacn@vfshelpline.com (mailto:infoctu.itacn@vfshelpline.com)                                                                            for Chengdu Italy Visa Application Centerinfokm.itacn@vfshelpline.com (mailto:infokm.itacn@vfshelpline.com)                                                                            for Kunming Italy Visa Application Center at least 3 working days prior to the desired date of documents submission. Agencies can submit application at the Italy Visa Application
                                                                            Centers according to scheduled appointment from Monday to Friday (except National Holidays). ADS groups can also book appointments during the weekend by choosing the ADS Prime-Time
                                                                            service at an additional cost to be added to the regular ADS group service fee. All agents must bring with them their white badge issued by the Consulate General of Italy in Chongqing.
Agencies authorized to lodge ADS group visa applications can pay the visa and service fees through credit card/Alipay or Wechat at the Italy Visa Application Centers the day of applicants’
                                                                            biometric data enrolment or the day before the biometrics collection by bank transfer to the bank account that will be provided by the Visa Center when booking the appointment.
                                                                            
Please note: 
The Visa Application Centers are authorized by the Embassy/Consulate of Italy to be paid a service fee for each ADS group visa applicant. For the updated ADS service fee, please check
                                                                            the Visa Fees webpage.
Please note: 
The ADS group should abide by the time scheduled in order to ensure a timely application and not influence negatively other groups’ scheduled appointment. In case the ADS group or
                                                                            its applicant(s) fail to show up at the Visa center on time, the ADS group members can select the VIP service (for the updated VIP service fee, please check the Service Fees webpage)
                                                                            on the same date or reschedule another day their appointment.
